items.raw_desc: Mikrofon Luucco Melo-S1 Large Diaphragm Studio Condenser Microphone:The Luucco Melo-S1 large-diaphragm condenser microphone is a studio microphone designed for exceptional sound recording quality. It is ideal for recording vocals, acoustic instruments and other sound sources where detailed and faithful reproduction is key. The Melo-S1 microphone uses a large 34mm gold-plated diaphragm and a cardioid polar pattern that minimizes sound pickup from the sides and rear and focuses on the sound source directly in front of the microphone. It delivers clear and detailed sound with a frequency response of 20-20,000 Hz. The microphone connects via a balanced 3-pin XLR connector and requires 24V or 48V phantom power. The package also includes a shock mount and a 3/8" to 5/8" adapter to facilitate mounting on various microphone stands. Your goal is to stop Skynet before it destroys the human race. Each mission is filled with action and the nostalgic atmosphere of 90s slot machines. The nameless heroIn Terminator 2D: NO FATE PS4 also takes a look into the future as John Connor leads the human Resistance against the machines in a fight for survival. Terminator 2D: NO FATE PS4 combines a cinematic classic with a new gaming experience that will thrill fans and newcomers alike....
